QFrame { background-color: rgba(20, 26, 34, 220); border: 1px solid rgba(60, 70, 85, 180); border-radius: 4px; }

stylesheet: QFrame[panel='true'] { background: qlineargradient(x1:0, y1:0, x2:0, y2:1,  stop:0 rgba(20, 26, 34, 195), stop:1 rgba(10, 14, 20, 195)); border: 1px solid rgba(60, 70, 85, 180); border-radius: 8px; }
